messages.body: Hello Sky, Good afternoon!  I found your salon on Groupon, and I’m assuming I’m speaking to the owner- apologies in advance if I got the name wrong, I actually tried checking your GBP before messaging you!  This is Simar…

Subject: ZLuxe - 8,240 people searched for your service this month 😮\n\nBody: Hi ZLuxe, This month, 8,240 people in Las Vegas searched for your service. Most never found you—your competitors did. Right now, potential cus…

Hey Sky,  This is Shikha, your Account Manager at Zoca.😊 Would love to hop on a quick call and get to know you better, and also walk you through how we can make things smoother for your business. Please let me know your …
Hello Sky, extremely sorry - I was completely caught up in client calls. Would you have some availability for tomorrow morning?
Good Morning Sky,  Here’s the meet link for the call -  meet.google.com/kvu-dqoa-gii
Your call has been forwarded to an automated voice messaging system. Voice is 2-4-0-1.
